api_key.description: RentCast API key, sent as the X-Api-Key header. Never logged.

base_url.description: RentCast API base URL override for tests or proxies.

address.description: Optional street address filter applied to every stream's request, matching legacy's config-driven query filter.

city.description: Optional city filter applied to every stream's request.

state.description: Optional state filter applied to every stream's request.

zip_code.description: Optional ZIP code filter applied to every stream's request (RentCast's zipCode query parameter).

property_type.description: Optional property type filter applied to every stream's request (RentCast's propertyType query parameter).
